claim_boundary: Mechanical-to-KiCad constraints from EVT0 CAD; not routed PCB release.

constraints.action: Keep Edge.Cuts at 64.0 x 132.0 mm until display or enclosure anchor changes.
constraints.why: CAD battery window, ribs, and side rails are derived from this board outline.

constraints.action: Place display/touch FPC connector near x=23 mm, y=55 mm in CAD coordinates and preserve 22 x 10 mm bend keepout.
constraints.why: Chenghao CH550FH01A-CT class 5.5 inch MIPI LCD + CTP uses the current cover-glass/TFT anchor and requires an FPC bend path into the phone.

constraints.action: Use selected USB-C footprint with shell stakes and align receptacle mouth to bottom-center enclosure aperture.
constraints.why: GCT USB4105 USB2 Type-C receptacle, reinforced shell is modeled with [12.5, 10.5, 5.0] mm insertion keepout.

constraints.action: Decide side-key flex versus direct PCB switches before schematic freeze; reserve left/right edge keepouts for power and volume actuators.
constraints.why: CAD button pressure checks assume side actuation and external orange caps.

constraints.action: Keep the 64 x 87 x 5.6 mm full-width battery cavity clear and do not route rigid PCB under the modeled pouch.
constraints.why: CAD non-overlap check uses segmented rigid board islands around this window.

constraints.action: If using RG255C LGA, reserve at least 29 x 32 x 2.4 mm plus RF keepout and coax/feed transition near antenna plastic.
Keep bottom speaker and MEMS microphone acoustic paths aligned to molded ports; avoid placing tall components under grille slots.
constraints.why: CAD now includes five speaker grille slots and two microphone ports.

constraints.action: Keep board/kicad/e1-phone/mechanical-overlay.yaml and the Dwgs.User MECH_KEEP_* rectangles in the concept PCB synchronized with CAD keepouts.
constraints.why: The board package checker now verifies display FPC, RF antenna, haptic, SIM/service, camera/earpiece, USB, button, and battery keepouts projected into KiCad.

next_kicad_edits: Replace concept rectangles with real footprints for USB4105, display FPC, camera FPCs, side tactile switches, speaker spring pads, MEMS microphones, and RG255C/alternate modem.
Promote mechanical-overlay.yaml keepouts into real KiCad keepout/courtyard objects once footprints replace concept rectangles.
Generate a board STEP with component 3D models and feed it back into mechanical/e1-phone instead of the current concept PCB mesh.
Add courtyard/height metadata for all edge-facing connectors so enclosure collision checks can consume them automatically.
